name: DragonBall Scouter
summary: Dragon Ball inspired scouter HUD with face lock and battle power reveal for Rokid glasses
description: DragonBall Scouter is a playful HUD app for Rokid glasses that detects faces and reveals battle power in a Dragon Ball style. It offers two modes: angular pseudo-AR HUD and live camera lock, with a timed scan and audio reveal. No cloud connection is required; all processing runs locally on the device.
author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About
DragonBall Scouter transforms Rokid glasses into a Dragon Ball-inspired scouter HUD featuring live face lock and battle power reveal.

## Key Features
- Two modes: ANGULAR HUD (pseudo-AR display) and LIVE CAM LOCK (camera overlay)
- On-device face detection with stable battle power values
- 6-second scan sequence with scramble animation and audio reveal
- Tap to start scan, swipe to switch modes
- Designed for Rokid glasses monochrome green display

## How It Works
- Detects faces locally using ML Kit
- Maintains consistent power level per tracked face
- Scan stops if face tracking is lost

## Usage
- Grant camera permission on first run
- Tap screen to start scanning
- Keep face in frame until power reveal
- Swipe left/right to toggle modes

## Notes
- Camera alignment may vary by device and fit
- No cloud or backend dependencies

releases.notes:
## Changelog

- Fixed the scan flow so the same face does not automatically restart a new analysis
- Scans are now re-armed only by a manual tap while the session is active
- Kept the current lock and revealed power stable across short face-detection dropouts
- Lowered the detector sound volume for a more comfortable level on glasses
- Kept the detector audio playing through brief tracking hiccups instead of cutting after 1 or 2 seconds
- Bumped the app version to `0.1.1`

## APK

The attached APK is the updated debug build from the latest `v0.1.1` state, tested on real Rokid glasses.

## Changelog

- Added the Dragon Ball detector sound and a 6-second battle power reveal sequence
- Kept the same battle power for the same tracked face during a scan
- Added `PRESS TO SCAN`, 20-second scan sessions, and immediate stop when tracking is lost
- Added switchable `ANGULAR HUD` and `LIVE CAM LOCK` modes
- Polished the HUD for Rokid monochrome displays with a clean black background
- Added GitHub Actions CI to build the debug APK automatically

## APK

The attached APK is the debug build generated from this release state and tested on real Rokid glasses.
